steps.title: Set up the units
steps.content: Maya made 46 cups of tomato sauce total and split it into $x$ small containers and $y$ large containers. The equation $4x + 7y = 46$ totals cups (the right-hand side is in cups), so each term on the left must also be in cups. That forces 4 and 7 to be cup-capacities: 4 cups per small container and 7 cups per large container.

steps.title: Interpret $7y$
steps.content: Since $y$ counts large containers and 7 is the cups per large container, the product $7y$ equals (cups per large container) $\times$ (number of large containers) $=$ total cups of tomato sauce in all the large containers.

steps.title: Eliminate the other choices
steps.content:
• A) Number of large containers is just $y$, not $7y$. Eliminate.
  • B) Number of small containers is $x$, not $7y$. Eliminate.
  • C) Total cups in large containers $= 7y$. Keep.
  • D) Total cups in small containers is $4x$, not $7y$. Eliminate.
That is the correct answer.
